testsuite.name: com.settlement.manager.domain.user.service.AuthServiceTest

testcase.name: 잠긴 계정 로그인 시도 -> 예외 처리
로그인 성공 -> 토큰 반환 및 failCount 초기화
탈퇴한 계정 로그인 시도 -> 예외 처리

testsuite.system-out: 2026-04-25T19:05:17.639+09:00 WARN 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그인 실패. email=test@test.com failCount=1 2026-04-25T19:05:17.643+09:00 INFO 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그인 성공. userId=null 2026-04-25T19:05:17.649+09:00 INFO 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그아웃. userId=1 2026-04-25T19:05:17.661+09:00 WARN 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그인 실패. email=test@test.com failCount=1 2026-04-25T19:05:17.661+09:00 WARN 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그인 실패. email=test@test.com failCount=2 2026-04-25T19:05:17.661+09:00 WARN 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그인 실패. email=test@test.com failCount=3 2026-04-25T19:05:17.662+09:00 WARN 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그인 실패. email=test@test.com failCount=4 2026-04-25T19:05:17.662+09:00 WARN 18264 --- [settlement-manager] [ Test worker] c.s.m.domain.user.service.AuthService : 로그인 실패. email=test@test.com failCount=5
